    A

    Account - Class in com.bank.core.domain.model
    Core domain entity representing a bank account.
    Account(UUID, UUID, Money, Currency, AccountStatus, Long, Instant, Instant) - Constructor for class com.bank.core.domain.model.Account
    Constructs an Account with all fields supplied, typically used when reconstituting an entity from the persistence layer.
    AccountBlockedException - Exception Class in com.bank.core.domain.exception
    Thrown when an operation is attempted on an account whose status is AccountStatus.BLOCKED.
    AccountBlockedException(UUID) - Constructor for exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.AccountBlockedException
    Constructs an AccountBlockedException for the given account identifier.
    AccountController - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web
    Inbound REST adapter for account management operations.
    AccountController(CreateAccountUseCase, GetAccountUseCase) - Constructor for class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.AccountController
    Constructs an AccountController with the required use cases.
    accountId - Variable in exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.AccountBlockedException
    The identifier of the blocked account.
    accountId - Variable in exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.AccountNotFoundException
    The identifier of the account that was not found.
    accountId - Variable in exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.InsufficientFundsException
    The source account that lacked sufficient funds.
    AccountJpaEntity - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity
    JPA entity adapter for the accounts table.
    AccountJpaEntity() - Constructor for class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.AccountJpaEntity
    Default no-arg constructor required by the JPA specification.
    AccountJpaEntity(UUID, UUID, BigDecimal, String, AccountStatus, Long, Instant, Instant) - Constructor for class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.AccountJpaEntity
    Full constructor used by the persistence adapter when mapping from the domain object.
    AccountNotFoundException - Exception Class in com.bank.core.domain.exception
    Thrown when a requested Account cannot be located in the persistence store.
    AccountNotFoundException(UUID) - Constructor for exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.AccountNotFoundException
    Constructs an AccountNotFoundException for the given account identifier.
    AccountPersistenceAdapter - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence
    Outbound persistence adapter implementing the AccountRepository port.

    Constructs an AccountPersistenceAdapter with the required Spring Data repository.

    Outbound port defining the persistence contract for Account entities.

    Response DTO representing a bank account returned by the REST API.

    Enumeration of the possible lifecycle states of a bank Account.
    AccountStatus() - Constructor for enum class com.bank.core.domain.model.AccountStatus
     
    ACTIVE - Enum constant in enum class com.bank.core.domain.model.AccountStatus
    The account is operational and may participate in fund transfers.

    Returns a new Money instance representing the sum of this amount and other.

    Represents a single field-level validation violation.
    assertSameCurrency(Money) - Method in record class com.bank.core.domain.model.Money
    Validates that other has the same currency as this instance.
    availableBalance - Variable in exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.InsufficientFundsException
    The balance available at the time of the failed debit.

    B

    balance - Variable in class com.bank.core.domain.model.Account
    Current available balance; always uses Money.SCALE decimal places.
    balance - Variable in record class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.dto.AccountResponse
    The field for the balance record component.
    balance - Variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.AccountJpaEntity
    Current balance stored as NUMERIC(19,4).
    balance() - Method in record class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.dto.AccountResponse
    Returns the value of the balance record component.
    bankingEventsExchange() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Declares the primary banking.events DirectExchange.
    block() - Method in class com.bank.core.domain.model.Account
    Blocks this account, preventing any further debit or credit operations.
    BLOCKED - Enum constant in enum class com.bank.core.domain.model.AccountStatus
    The account is frozen.
    buildError(HttpStatus, String, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Builds a standard ApiErrorResponse with an empty field-error list.
    buildTransactionFromCache(String) - Method in class com.bank.core.application.service.TransferFundsService
    Reconstructs a minimal Transaction domain object from a cached JSON string.
    buildTransactionPayload(Transaction) - Method in class com.bank.core.application.service.TransferFundsService
    Serializes a Transaction to a JSON string for use as the outbox payload and the idempotency cache entry.

    Factory method for recording a successful transfer.
    COMPLETED - Enum constant in enum class com.bank.core.domain.model.TransactionStatus
    The transaction completed successfully and the ledger has been updated.

    Opens a new bank account for the specified customer.

    createdAt - Variable in class com.bank.core.domain.model.Account
    Timestamp at which the account record was first created.
    createdAt - Variable in class com.bank.core.domain.model.OutboxMessage
    The moment this outbox record was created (same as the enclosing transaction).

    The moment at which this transaction was recorded.

    D

    deadLetterExchange() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Declares the dead-letter exchange used to route failed messages to DLQs.
    debit(Money) - Method in class com.bank.core.domain.model.Account
    Debits this account by subtracting the specified amount from the balance.

    The field for the destinationAccountId record component.

    DLQ_SUFFIX - Static variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    DLQ suffix appended to each primary queue name.
    DLX_NAME - Static variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Dead-letter exchange name (reuses the default exchange routing by queue name).
    DuplicateTransactionException - Exception Class in com.bank.core.domain.exception
    Thrown when a transfer request arrives with an Idempotency-Key that has already been processed within its 24-hour TTL window.
    DuplicateTransactionException(String) - Constructor for exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.DuplicateTransactionException
    Constructs a DuplicateTransactionException for the given idempotency key.

    E

    ensureActive() - Method in class com.bank.core.domain.model.Account
    Ensures this account is currently in AccountStatus.ACTIVE state.

    F

    findById(UUID) - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.AccountRepository
    Finds an account by its unique identifier.
    findById(UUID) - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.TransactionRepository
    Finds a transaction by its unique identifier.
    findById(UUID) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.AccountPersistenceAdapter
    Finds an account by its unique identifier.
    findById(UUID) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.TransactionPersistenceAdapter
    Finds a transaction by its unique identifier.
    findByIdempotencyKey(String) - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.TransactionRepository
    Finds the most recent transaction associated with a given idempotency key.
    findByIdempotencyKey(String) - Method in interface com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.repository.SpringDataTransactionRepository
    Finds the transaction associated with the given idempotency key.
    findByIdempotencyKey(String) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.TransactionPersistenceAdapter
    Finds the most recent transaction associated with a given idempotency key.
    findByIdWithLock(UUID) - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.AccountRepository
    Acquires a pessimistic write lock on the account record and returns it.
    findByIdWithLock(UUID) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.AccountPersistenceAdapter
    Acquires a pessimistic write lock on the account record and returns it.
    findByIdWithLock(UUID) - Method in interface com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.repository.SpringDataAccountRepository
    Finds an account by ID and acquires a SELECT FOR UPDATE database lock.
    findByPublishedFalse() - Method in interface com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.repository.SpringDataOutboxMessageRepository
    Retrieves all outbox message records that have not yet been relayed to the broker.
    findUnpublished() - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.OutboxMessageRepository
    Retrieves all outbox messages that have not yet been published to the broker.
    findUnpublished() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.OutboxMessagePersistenceAdapter
    Retrieves all outbox messages that have not yet been published to the broker.
    fraudCheckBinding() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Binds fraud-check.queue to the primary exchange using the transaction-completed routing key.
    fraudCheckDlq() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Declares the fraud-check.queue.dlq for failed fraud-check messages.
    fraudCheckDlqBinding() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Binds fraud-check.queue.dlq to the DLX.
    fraudCheckQueue - Variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
     
    fraudCheckQueue() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Declares the fraud-check.queue with a DLX configuration.

    Factory method that maps a domain Account to an AccountResponse.

    G

    get(String) - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.IdempotencyPort
    Retrieves the previously stored response for the given idempotency key.

    Retrieves the previously stored response for the given idempotency key.

    getAccountId() - Method in exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.AccountNotFoundException
    Returns the identifier of the account that was not found.
    getAccountId() - Method in exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.InsufficientFundsException

    GlobalExceptionHandler - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web
    Global exception handler that maps domain and infrastructure exceptions to standardised HTTP error responses.
    GlobalExceptionHandler() - Constructor for class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
     

    H

    handleAccountBlocked(AccountBlockedException, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles AccountBlockedException (HTTP 422).
    handleAccountNotFound(AccountNotFoundException, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles AccountNotFoundException (HTTP 404).
    handleDuplicateTransaction(DuplicateTransactionException, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles DuplicateTransactionException (HTTP 409).
    handleInsufficientFunds(InsufficientFundsException, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles InsufficientFundsException (HTTP 422).
    handleOptimisticLock(OptimisticLockingFailureException, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles OptimisticLockingFailureException (HTTP 409).
    handleUnexpected(Exception, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Catch-all handler for unexpected exceptions (HTTP 500).
    handleValidation(MethodArgumentNotValidException, HttpServletRequest) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.in.web.GlobalExceptionHandler
    Handles MethodArgumentNotValidException (HTTP 400).

    InsufficientFundsException - Exception Class in com.bank.core.domain.exception
    Thrown when a debit operation cannot be completed because the source account does not hold sufficient funds to cover the requested transfer amount.
    InsufficientFundsException(UUID, Money, Money) - Constructor for exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.InsufficientFundsException
    Constructs an InsufficientFundsException with detailed balance information.
    isGreaterThanOrEqualTo(Money) - Method in record class com.bank.core.domain.model.Money
    Returns true if this amount is greater than or equal to other.
    isPublished() - Method in class com.bank.core.domain.model.OutboxMessage
    Returns whether the message has been delivered to the broker.
    isPublished() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.OutboxMessageJpaEntity
     
    isZero() - Method in record class com.bank.core.domain.model.Money
    Returns true if this amount equals zero.

    METRIC_TRANSFER_FAILED - Static variable in class com.bank.core.application.service.TransferFundsService
    Micrometer counter name for failed transfers.
    METRIC_TRANSFER_IDEMPOTENT - Static variable in class com.bank.core.application.service.TransferFundsService

    Immutable value object representing a monetary amount in a specific currency.

    N

    notificationBinding() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Binds notification.queue to the primary exchange using the transaction-completed routing key.

    Declares the notification.queue.dlq for failed notification messages.

    Binds notification.queue.dlq to the DLX.
    notificationQueue - Variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
     
    notificationQueue() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Declares the notification.queue with a DLX configuration.

    objectMapper - Variable in class com.bank.core.application.service.TransferFundsService
     
    of(String, String) - Static method in record class com.bank.core.domain.model.Money
    Factory method that creates a Money instance from a plain String representation of the amount and an ISO 4217 currency code string.

    Factory method that creates a Money instance from a BigDecimal and an ISO 4217 currency code string.

    Processes a transaction-completed event for the purpose of fraud analysis.

    Processes a transaction-completed event for the purpose of customer notification.

    OutboxMessage - Class in com.bank.core.domain.model
    Domain entity representing a pending outbound AMQP message stored in the transactional outbox table.
    OutboxMessage(UUID, String, String, String, boolean, Instant, Instant) - Constructor for class com.bank.core.domain.model.OutboxMessage
    Full constructor used when reconstituting a record from the persistence layer.

    JPA entity adapter for the outbox_messages table.

    Default no-arg constructor required by the JPA specification.

    Full constructor used by the persistence adapter.

    Outbound persistence adapter implementing the OutboxMessageRepository port.

    Constructs an OutboxMessagePersistenceAdapter.

    Outbound port defining the persistence contract for OutboxMessage entities.
    OutboxRelayScheduler - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.messaging
    Scheduled background component that implements the relay half of the Transactional Outbox Pattern.
    OutboxRelayScheduler(OutboxMessageRepository, MessagePublisherPort, MeterRegistry) - Constructor for class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.messaging.OutboxRelayScheduler
    Constructs an OutboxRelayScheduler with its required dependencies.

    Returns the Redis key with the namespace prefix applied.
    PROCESSING_SENTINEL - Static variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.cache.RedisIdempotencyAdapter
    Sentinel value written during initial lock acquisition.
    publish(OutboxMessage) - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.MessagePublisherPort
    Publishes the payload of the given OutboxMessage to the configured RabbitMQ exchange using the message's routing key.
    publish(OutboxMessage) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.messaging.RabbitMQPublisherAdapter
    Publishes the payload of the given OutboxMessage to the configured RabbitMQ exchange using the message's routing key.
    published - Variable in class com.bank.core.domain.model.OutboxMessage
    Indicates whether this message has been successfully delivered to the broker.
    published - Variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.OutboxMessageJpaEntity
    Whether this message has been delivered to the broker.
    publishedAt - Variable in class com.bank.core.domain.model.OutboxMessage
    The moment this outbox record was published to the broker, or null if pending.
    publishedAt - Variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.OutboxMessageJpaEntity
    The timestamp at which the relay published this record to the broker.

    RabbitMQConfig - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.config
    Spring configuration for all RabbitMQ topology and listener infrastructure.

    RabbitMQPublisherAdapter - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.messaging
    Outbound messaging adapter implementing the MessagePublisherPort using Spring AMQP's RabbitTemplate.

    Constructs a RabbitMQPublisherAdapter with the provided RabbitTemplate.

    rabbitTemplate(ConnectionFactory) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Configures the RabbitTemplate to use JSON message conversion.
    RedisIdempotencyAdapter - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.cache
    Outbound cache adapter implementing the IdempotencyPort using Redis.

    Constructs a RedisIdempotencyAdapter.

    relay() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.messaging.OutboxRelayScheduler
    Polls for unpublished outbox messages and relays them to RabbitMQ.
    relayMessage(OutboxMessage) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.messaging.OutboxRelayScheduler
    Publishes a single outbox message and marks it as delivered.
    release(String) - Method in interface com.bank.core.application.port.out.IdempotencyPort
    Removes the idempotency key from the store.
    release(String) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.cache.RedisIdempotencyAdapter
    Removes the idempotency key from the store.
    requestedAmount - Variable in exception class com.bank.core.domain.exception.InsufficientFundsException
    The amount that was requested but could not be fulfilled.
    retryableContainerFactory(ConnectionFactory) - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.RabbitMQConfig
    Configures a SimpleRabbitListenerContainerFactory with a stateless retry interceptor (3 attempts, exponential back-off starting at 1 second).
    ROUNDING_MODE - Static variable in record class com.bank.core.domain.model.Money
    Rounding mode applied to all fractional calculations (banker's rounding).
    routingKey - Variable in class com.bank.core.domain.model.OutboxMessage
    The AMQP routing key that determines which queues receive the message.
    routingKey - Variable in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.out.persistence.entity.OutboxMessageJpaEntity
    The AMQP routing key.

    Executes a fund transfer from the source account to the destination account.

    Executes a fund transfer from the source account to the destination account.

    virtualThreadExecutor() - Method in class com.bank.core.infrastructure.config.VirtualThreadsConfig
    Exposes a virtual-thread-per-task Executor as a Spring bean, which Spring Boot auto-configures as the default task executor for @Async and @Scheduled methods when present.
    VirtualThreadsConfig - Class in com.bank.core.infrastructure.config
    Configures Java 21 Virtual Threads as the default executor for Spring MVC's request handling thread pool and the application task executor.
